torch_pattern:
ref_q = A[:, :, :, : {HIDDEN}]
ref_k = A[:, :, :, {HIDDEN} : 2 * {HIDDEN}]
ref_v = A[:, :, :, 2 * {HIDDEN} :]
ref_q = torch.reshape(ref_q, [{BATCH}, {SEQ_LEN}, {NUM_HEADS}, {HEAD_DIM}]).transpose(-3, -2)
ref_k = torch.reshape(ref_k, [{BATCH}, {SEQ_LEN}, {NUM_HEADS}, {HEAD_DIM}]).transpose(-3, -2)
ref_v = torch.reshape(ref_v, [{BATCH}, {SEQ_LEN}, {NUM_HEADS}, {HEAD_DIM}]).transpose(-3, -2)

config_template.notes: ViT-base defaults: HIDDEN=768, NUM_HEADS=12, HEAD_DIM=64; input must be TILE_LAYOUT

applicability_notes: constraints: {'input_layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT', 'last_dim': 'must equal 3 * NUM_HEADS * HEAD_DIM (fused QKV)', 'outputs': 'tuple of 3 tensors (q, k, v)'}

placement_observations.source: unit_test (in0_mem_config parametrized over DRAM/L1 interleaved; buffer_type asserted to match)
unit_test (out_mem_config parametrized over DRAM/L1 interleaved; q/k/v buffer_type asserted to match out_mem_config)
